title: Massaman Pork Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry made with massaman curry paste, pork, and australian ingredients. A perfect dish for special occasions.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add lemongrass and galangal; cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
3. Add curry paste; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
4. Add pork; cook, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Add sweet potatoes; cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
6. Pour in coconut milk; bring to a simmer.
7. Reduce heat to low; cook, stirring occasionally, until pork is tender and sauce has thickened, about 20 minutes.
8. Season with fish sauce (if using), salt, and black pepper.
9. Serve with steamed rice or noodles; garnish with lime wedges.
